message:
test(config): add TOML upsert and render pure-logic tests

Tests for upsertTOMLTable (insert/replace/empty/trailing newline),
upsertTOMLKey (update/insert/after-comments/trailing newline),
renderTOMLStringArray (empty/single/multi/dedup/trim/filter),
renderPaletteStateTOML (empty/with values).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
